description: Configure GPredict for a portable amateur radio satellite station at a temporary Field Day site. The configuration must include a ground station named 'Tussey_Mountain' (40.7270 N, 77.8023 W, Altitude 640m) and a module named 'FieldDay' containing five specific satellites: ISS (25544), SO-50 (27607), AO-7 (7530), AO-85 (40967), and AO-91 (43017). Ensure the 'FieldDay' module is assigned to the 'Tussey_Mountain' ground station and that all timestamps in GPredict are set to display in UTC. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
